name: OpenIPAHound 02 Path - AddMember To Host Admin
description: Finds principals that can add members to a group which has, or inherits, both SSH and sudo access to the same host. Validate by testing the membership change, refreshed login state, host access, sudo behavior, and cleanup.
query:
MATCH add_path=(controller)-[add_member:IPA_AddMember]->(managed_group:IPA_Group)
WHERE controller:IPA_User OR controller:IPA_Group OR controller:IPA_Service OR controller:IPA_Computer
MATCH group_path=(managed_group)-[:IPA_MemberOf*0..3]->(access_scope:IPA_Group)
MATCH ssh_path=(access_scope)-[ssh:IPA_CanSSH]->(host:IPA_Computer)
MATCH sudo_path=(access_scope)-[sudo:IPA_CanSUDO]->(host)
RETURN add_path, group_path, ssh_path, sudo_path,
       coalesce(controller.uid, controller.cn, controller.principal, controller.fqdn) AS controller_name,
       managed_group.cn AS managed_group,
       access_scope.cn AS access_scope,
       host.fqdn AS host_fqdn,
       ssh.hbacrule AS hbac_rule,
       sudo.sudorule AS sudo_rule,
       sudo.nopassword AS sudo_nopassword
LIMIT 1000
